rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within AADL component type or implementation annexes
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Component structure and port information is sourced from the AADL model and must be used to validate AGREE contract scope
Implementation-level bindings and assignments should be placed in component implementation annexes
AGREE variables must be explicitly declared or scoped from AADL ports and subcomponents
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and use only visible identifiers from the AADL model
Assumptions and guarantees should reference component ports only when they are valid in the current scope
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid in that scope
Do not encode AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their mapping to AGREE expressions
Event port numeric encoding and Boolean comparisons
